name: acceptance49_blueprint
description: Expanded diagnostic acceptance surface built on parity39 plus a low-context authored batch to widen coverage without mutating the frozen control surfaces.

new_case_slots.rationale: Reduces overreliance on simple minimum-period questions by adding the REOI follow-on timing window and prior-notice content test.
Adds threshold exactness plus a partial-abstention trap around a non-specified numeric day count.
Adds a hallucination-resistant controlled-goods contact-detail case anchored to what the page itself does and does not provide.
Adds an authoritative-role split case where the TBS directive, not the Buy Canadian overview page, controls.
Adds a complex approval-sequencing case spanning changed complexity, changed risk, evaluation review, and delegation.
Adds PSIB plus CLCA plus ISC audit sequencing, which broadens the Indigenous procurement surface materially.
Adds emergency-contracting authority hierarchy, trade-agreement exceptions, reporting, and ratification in one question.
Adds mandatory standing-offer/supply-arrangement use with a CLCA exception and a new-procurement fallback.
Adds a restricted-source boundary case for Buy Canadian operative detail without phrasing the question in repo-internal language.
Adds a source-handoff and timing case for reciprocal procurement declarations that is easy to answer incorrectly from the high-level policy page.

notes: The parity19 control remains frozen and is still the canonical optimization control surface.
This surface is for broader diagnostic coverage and later promotion work, not for replacing the control surface.
The new cases were drafted from the local corpus snapshot plus live official-site structure awareness, with low-context subagent assistance to reduce benchmark contamination.
